login.title: Sign in to AEOGEO
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access your dashboard
login.noAccount: Don't have an account? Sign up.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Fill in the details below to get started
register.clerkHint: Create your Clerk account first. AEOGEO workspace setup continues in the next step.
register.inviteOnlySubtitle: Ask your AEOGEO administrator to send you a Clerk invitation. Use the invitation link to join your workspace.
register.inviteOnly: Registration is by invitation only. If you have an invite link, please use it.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.clerkHint: Password reset is handled by Clerk from the sign-in flow below.
forgotPassword.successMessage: We've sent a password reset link to {{email}}.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

errors.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
errors.failed: Failed to send reset link. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for your account.
resetPassword.clerkHint: Complete your password reset through the Clerk flow below.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated successfully.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.tokenExpired: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.tokenInvalid: This reset link is invalid. Please request a new one.
errors.missingTokenHint: This link does not include a reset token.
errors.failed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.

acceptInvite.title: Join your team on AEOGEO
acceptInvite.subtitle: You've been invited to join an organization. Set up your account below.
acceptInvite.clerkHint: Accept your Clerk invitation below. AEOGEO permissions will be linked automatically after sign-up.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.tokenExpired: This invitation has expired. Please ask your administrator to send a new one.
errors.tokenInvalid: This invitation link is invalid. Please check the link or contact your administrator.
errors.missingTokenHint: This link doesn't contain an invitation token. Please use the link from your invitation email.
errors.failed: Failed to accept invitation. Please try again.

completeSignup.title: Finish setting up AEOGEO
completeSignup.subtitle: Create your AEOGEO workspace so we can link your Clerk account to local projects and permissions.
completeSignup.autoLinking: Checking whether this account already belongs to an existing AEOGEO workspace...
completeSignup.failed: Could not finish setup. Please try again.
